name: claude-engineering-suite
description: Human-in-the-loop AI software engineering: the engine (software-engineer) and the acceptance-time brake (centaur-layer). Pair with claude-charter (installed separately) for the policy layer.

plugins.name: software-engineer
plugins.description: The engine — one natural-language entry point that triages every request and runs the right depth of engineering: clarify, spec, ADR, risk, plan, implement, test, senior review. Defers to claude-charter and centaur-layer when present.

plugins.name: centaur-layer
plugins.description: The brake — pre-commit diff-risk scoring (low/med/high) plus a human comprehension check, so AI can accelerate coding without weakening the developer's reasoning. Questions the human, not the machine.
